title: Xisaabiyaha Kharashka Soo-gaadhka
subtitle: Xisaabi kharashkaaga dhabta ah ee halkii oo ay ku jiraan shixnadda, canshuurta, VAT, iyo sarrifka — kadibna arag faa'iidadaada dhabta ah.
alertOverEstimatingTitle: Waxaad ku qiyaasi jirtay faa'iido ka badan {gap}
supplierCostLabel: Kharashka alaab-qeybiyaha (oo ay ku jirto dheeli sarrif)
importVatRecoverable: {amount} (dib loo heli karo haddaad VAT diiwaangashan tahay)
vatExplanation: VAT-ka soo dejinta waxaa lagu bixiyaa xudduudda laakiin dib ayaa loo heli karaa soo-celintaada VAT ee xigta haddaad VAT diiwaangashan tahay. Waa kharash socodka lacagta — sida caadiga ah 30-60 maalmood — maaha kharash joogto ah.
askPrompt: Waa maxay kharashkayga soo-gaadhka dhabta ah iyo faa'iidadu? Waxaan ka soo dejiyaa {origin} {sym}{unitCost}/halkii, waxaan ku iibiyaa {sym}{sellingPrice}, heerka canshuurta {dutyRate}%.
emptyHeading: Ogow faa'iidadaada dhabta ah ka hor intaadan iibsan
emptyBody: Kor ku geli faahfaahinta badeecadaada. Shixnadda, canshuurta, iyo sarrifku sida caadiga ah waxay ku daraan 15-30% kharashkaaga dhabta ah ee halkii.
